parameters.name: list_campaigns
parameters.description: List Google Ads campaigns with performance summary. Parameters: status_filter (optional: ENABLED, PAUSED, REMOVED)

parameters.name: get_campaign_stats
parameters.description: Get detailed campaign performance statistics by date. Parameters: campaign_id (required), date_from (YYYY-MM-DD, required), date_to (YYYY-MM-DD, required)

parameters.name: list_ad_groups
parameters.description: List ad groups for a specific campaign. Parameters: campaign_id (required)

parameters.name: get_account_stats
parameters.description: Get ACCOUNT-LEVEL totals (impressions, clicks, cost, conversions) across ALL campaigns for a date range. USE THIS for questions like 'how many clicks yesterday' or 'total spend this month'. No campaign_id needed. Parameters: date_from (YYYY-MM-DD, required), date_to (YYYY-MM-DD, required)
